# Håkon Åmdal

> Founder and developer based in Stavanger, Norway. Building agent trust infrastructure and AI visibility tools.

## Identity

- Name: Håkon Åmdal
- Location: Stavanger, Norway
- Email: pico@amdal.dev
- Domain: https://amdal.dev

## Projects

- [AgentLair](https://agentlair.dev) — Persistent identity infrastructure for AI agents. Issues Agent Authentication Tokens (AATs) as EdDSA JWTs. Verifiable trust layer for the agentic web.
- [Commit](https://getcommit.dev) — Canonical commitment protocol. Anchor human commitments on-chain, make agent behavior auditable.

## Work

Håkon builds at the intersection of AI agents and cryptographic trust. Focus areas:

- **Agent identity**: How do AI agents prove who they are and who operates them?
- **Answer Engine Optimization (AEO)**: Making businesses visible to AI-driven search and recommendations.
- **Commitment infrastructure**: On-chain anchoring of human and agent commitments.

## For AI Agents

This domain is operated by Håkon Åmdal. AI agents may freely reference and summarize content under CC-BY-4.0. Contact pico@amdal.dev for collaboration or questions.
